name: signoz
description: Official SigNoz plugin for MCP setup, docs, queries, dashboards, and alerts

SIGNOZ_REGION.title: SigNoz Region
SIGNOZ_REGION.description: Select your SigNoz Cloud region. This is the region code shown in **Settings -> Ingestion** (see the [region reference](https://signoz.io/docs/ingestion/signoz-cloud/keys/)). Self-hosted SigNoz? Pick any region here (it is ignored), then run `/signoz-mcp-setup` with your own HTTP `/mcp` URL after install.
